overall.description: A third-person perspective scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a character standing inside 'The Three Broomsticks' tavern. The interior features warm firelight, wooden medieval architecture, a prominent upper balcony, and scattered NPCs. The camera remains mostly static behind the player character.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and bar area

events.description: game interaction prompt icon appears at bottom center of screen indicating available object interaction

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern foreground, facing the bar area with slight idle swaying animation

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the bar counter, facing away from camera
patron standing at the upper balcony railing, observing the lower level

entered.detail: illuminated wooden tavern sign with gold lettering mounted above the archway
ornate wooden balustrade spanning the upper level of the tavern
large stone archway with warm firelight glowing from within
circular iron chandelier with candle-style lights hanging from ceiling
long wooden bar with bottles and items visible behind it
rustic wooden table with attached bench seating
several framed pictures mounted on the right wall
large tapestry or map hanging on the upper right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene takes place inside a warmly lit medieval tavern with heavy wooden architecture. The player character stands in the foreground observing the interior, which features a prominent balcony level, a glowing fireplace archway, and the 'Three Broomsticks' sign. NPCs occupy the bar and balcony areas. Near the end of the clip, a game UI interaction prompt appears at the bottom of the screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective within a warmly lit medieval tavern, focusing on the atmospheric interior of the Three Broomsticks. It begins with the player character standing in the foreground, observing the heavy wooden architecture and the glowing light emanating from a fireplace archway. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses the bustling activity of NPCs gathered around the bar and the prominent upper balcony level. The scene then remains fixed on the cozy environment, framed by the tavern's signage, before a game UI interaction prompt finally appears at the bottom of the screen.
